violations.text: The following equipment in the kitchen area were observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The plastic molded handles to the 2 door reach-in refrigerator were observed in poor repair/taped - Surfaces of the counter and cabinet coating located in the kitchen area were observed in need of repair. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed and maintained with a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2026

The floor in the kitchen area under the 2 Door Reach-in Cooler and Shelving unit was observed to be in poor repair (tiles missing exposing the wooden subflooring). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. At the time of inspection, an application for Certified Food Safety Manager License and Check was observed to be filled out by the PIC. Per the PIC, will submit application and payment as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The following equipment in the kitchen area were observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The plastic molded handles to the 2 door reach-in refrigerator were observed in poor repair/taped - Surfaces of the counter and cabinet coating located in the kitchen area were observed in need of repair. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed and maintained with a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The facility is lacking a mop/service sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The floor in the kitchen area under the 2 Door Reach-in Cooler and Shelving unit was observed to be in poor repair (tiles missing exposing the wooden subflooring). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay Sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

At the time of inspection, the following areas of the physical facilities in the kitchen area were observed in need of repair... - The floor was observed to have missing tiles - The coving at the base of cabinets was observed to be missing/pealing The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023
